//: This project is plain JSX — no TypeScript. The file exists anyway because
Vite 8's oxc transformer resolves the NEAREST tsconfig by walking up the
directory tree, and without one here it escapes the repo entirely.
On a clone nested inside a Moodle checkout it walks up to Moodle's own
generated by Moodle's grunt build that a plain checkout does not have.
oxc then fails every transform with:
which serves a broken module for main.jsx and renders a blank page. This
file stops the upward search at the project boundary, where it belongs.
It is inert for anyone whose clone is not nested.
